title: ginkida/gokin
summary: A powerful CLI tool that brings AI assistance directly to your terminal. Gokin understands your codebase and helps with file operations, code search, shell commands, git workflows, task management, and more - all through natural language.

title: Kevinbeltran123/Unibabot_PDA
summary: Intelligent agent for automated compliance verification of Academic Development Plans (PDAs) at University of Ibagué. Rule-driven pipeline + Docling + Qwen 2.5 14B reaching 1.000 accuracy on hold-out test set.

title: kochj23/BlompieTV
summary: AI-powered text adventure game for Apple TV — connect to Ollama or OpenWebUI on your network for interactive fiction. Built with Swift and SwiftUI.

title: chieaid24/IoT-Energy-Tracker
summary: A microservice-centered backend aggregating energy usage for a user's home devices, automating alerts and generating AI-powered personalized insights. Streams device usage through Kafka, stores time-series data in InfluxDB, persists users/devices in MySQL, triggers alert emails, and generates insights via Ollama (gemma3).

title: openensemble/openensemble
summary: Self-hosted multi-user AI assistant with agents, memory, scheduler, and a built-in dashboard. Works with Claude, OpenAI, Ollama, LM Studio, and more.

title: bug-ops/zeph
summary: Rust AI agent where every context token earns its place. Self-learning skills, temporal graph memory, cascade quality   routing, OWASP AI security. Hybrid inference: Ollama · Claude · Gemini · OpenAI · GGUF. MCP + ACP. One binary.

title: Izanvz/MeetingAgent
summary: Agente IA local que transcribe reuniones y extrae resumen, decisiones y action items. LangGraph + Whisper + Ollama. Sin APIs de pago.

title: YanCheng-go/my-focal-ai
summary: Personal news intelligence — aggregate AI content from curated sources, score with LLM, serve your own dashboard

title: wildlux/Prismalux
summary: Piattaforma AI locale in C puro + GUI Qt6. Pipeline multi-agente, motore anti-allucinazione Byzantino, simulatore 66          algoritmi, matematica locale zero-token. Gira su Ollama. Zero cloud, zero abbonamenti.

title: harshil-sh/WeaveLLM
summary: WeaveLLM — Production-grade AI orchestration for .NET. Strongly typed chains,  RAG pipelines, multi-agent graphs, and tool use. The LangChain alternative  .NET developers actually deserve.

title: Izanvz/Sift
summary: On-premise enterprise RAG agent. Hybrid search (BM25 + vector + RRF + BGE reranker), inline citations, per-user scopes, self-critique loop. LangGraph · FastAPI · Ollama · ChromaDB.

title: chf3198/megingjord-harness
summary: AI agent governance harness: baton workflow, fleet LLM routing (Ollama/Claude/OpenRouter), and CI gates for Copilot, Claude Code, and Codex.

title: DaroHacka/proactive-sebastian-ai-companion
summary: Sebastian Proactive is a lightweight, local‑first AI companion designed to initiate interactions instead of waiting for prompts. It runs entirely on your machine through Ollama and uses a modular library system, a probabilistic selector, and a proactive scheduler to generate context‑aware messages at configurable intervals.

title: PlanExeOrg/PlanExe
summary: Create a plan from a description in minutes
